flagged.eye_of_midnight: On-equip proc (spell 1266505) not fully modeled in SimC. DPS results may understate this ring.
flagged.radiant_plume: Decaying stat mechanic - average value over fight is lower than tooltip. SimC models the decay.
flagged.umbral_plume: Unique-Equipped with Radiant Plume - cannot equip both.
flagged.stabilizing_gemstone_bandolier: DISABLED_EFFECT in SimC (spell 1251905) - proc not modeled. bandolier_mul() still applies 2x to Loa ring procs when equipped, but the Bandolier's own effect is missing. Defer until SimC implements it.
